# Build compatibility

> **MCP, IDE auto-connect, and Connections onboarding are not in the current Gumroad download (v0.99).**

The public beta (v0.99) supports copy-paste, in-plugin assistant, and Explore on macOS and Windows. MCP requires an **updated download from Gumroad** — see release notes when updating.

Before MCP setup: confirm **Settings → Connections** is present in the plugin. If it is missing, the user is on v0.99 — guide copy-paste or BYOK only; do not run MCP steps.
